meaning: Digital Video Broadcasting,数字视频广播
examples: DVB is an important standard for transferring digital video, IP data and so on.
At present, in China it is time to develop DTV, so the application of DVB has a bright future.
In Europe, the Multimedia Home Platform (MHP) specification based on DVB has begun to be put into business test.
It finds that a critical mass of countries have now adopted or committed to DVB-T2.
It has component and HDMI connectors, and is intended for the European market with its DVB-T tuner card.
